name: genomic-wellness
description: |

  metabolism, lactose intolerance, caffeine sensitivity, sleep, stress response,
  or general wellness optimization based on their genetics.**

  Also triggers for: MTHFR, methylation, vitamin deficiencies, gut health,

  Analyzes nutrient processing, methylation pathways, and lifestyle-relevant genetic traits.
category: longevity-analysis/wellness
---

# Wellness Analysis

Analyzes genetic variants affecting nutrition, fitness, sleep, and general wellness.

## Sub-categories

| Category | Key Genes | Focus |
|----------|-----------|-------|
| Methylation | MTHFR, MTRR, MTR, CBS | Folate/B12 metabolism |
| Nutrient Processing | VDR, HFE, FUT2 | Vitamin D, iron, B12 |
| Detoxification | CYP1A2, GSTP1, NQO1 | Phase I/II enzymes |
| Inflammation | SOD2, IL-6, IL-10 | Cytokine regulation |
| Histamine | DAO, HNMT | Histamine clearance |
| Circadian Rhythm | CLOCK, PER2 | Sleep-wake cycles |

## Key rsIDs

- rs1801133 (MTHFR C677T)
- rs1801394 (MTRR A66G)
- rs4988235 (LCT lactase persistence)
- rs1801260 (CLOCK T3111C)

## Dashboard Design

- **Card Color**: Teal (#14b8a6) header
- **Donut charts**: For nutrient status visualization
- **Gauge meters**: Methylation score, inflammation level
- **Timeline**: Daily schedule based on circadian type
